Package com.pms.model

Class DevelopmentTracker

java.lang.Object
com.pms.model.DevelopmentTracker
public class DevelopmentTracker extends Object
Tracks a project through its development lifecycle. Stage order: REQUIREMENT -> FEASIBILITY -> DESIGN -> TESTING -> DEPLOYMENT -> MAINTENANCE

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    DevelopmentTracker.Stage
    Lifecycle stages, matching the note: requirement feasibility, testing, deployment, maintenance.

    • advanceStage

      public boolean advanceStage()
      Moves to the next lifecycle stage, if one exists. Returns false if already at the final stage.
